programme.desc: Jim's sister (Jennifer Coolidge) shows up on his doorstep -- pregnant.

programme.desc: Andy resents a wealthy client (Nana Visitor), then ends up dating her.

programme.desc: Jill (Patricia Richardson) asks for a sentimental birthday gift, so Tim (Tim Allen) shops for lingerie.

programme.desc: The sparks fly when Jill sets up her pottery works in Tim's garage; Tim and Al trade places on "Tool Time.".

programme.desc: Jill's newlywed sister spoils Tim's poker night when she brings her marital problems to Jill and Tim.

programme.sub-title: Al's Fair in Love and War

programme.desc: Tim (Tim Allen) gets into trouble with his family when he installs new stereo equipment in the house. With Patricia Richardson, Richard Karn.

programme.desc: Jill (Patricia Richardson) grounds Brad (Zachery Ty Bryan) for hiding a dissected frog in cafeteria food and throwing bricks. With Tim Allen.

programme.desc: Jill makes Tim promise to stop looking at other women; industrial strength glue causes a sticky situation at work.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim pulls a groin muscle and tries to keep it a secret from Jill.

programme.desc: Eric locks himself in his bedroom for days after his breakup with Donna, ignoring the pleas of his parents.

programme.desc: Eric and Donna squabble over their friends following their breakup; Red and Pastor Dave become buddies.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Donna finds comfort in Eric's arms after her mother leaves, and Eric's convinced they're back together.

programme.desc: Kitty redecorates the basement after Hyde moves back in with the Formans; Fez takes up ballet to meet girls.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Eric is shocked when Red taps Kelso to play the stock boy in an instructional film on stocking shelves; Kelso models his performance on John Travolta's in "Saturday Night Fever"; Leo takes Hyde and Fez on a shopping spree.
